ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANT BRIAN K BELIER'S DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BRIAN BELIER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AS TO CERTAIN CAUSES OF ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMILLE BEMER IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. NONE OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED BY MS. BEMER DISCLOSE ON THEIR FACE THAT IT IS BARRED IN ITS ENTIRETY. IN ALL EVENTS, MS. BEMER ACKNOWLEDGES THAT SHE MAY NOT SEEK RELIEF BASED ON ALLEGED VIOLATIONS THAT OCCURRED OUTSIDE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN BELIER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to certain causes of action filed by plaintiff Camille Bemer is overruled in its entirety. None of the causes of action alleged by Ms. Bemer disclose on their face that it is barred in its entirety. In all events, Ms. Bemer acknowledges that she may not seek relief based on alleged violations that occurred outside the statute of limitations. Order signed after hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
